title_cn: 莱恩表示很难说欧洲央行不应该加息
summary: It’s difficult to argue that the European Central Bank should have refrained from raising borrowing costs this month, according to Chief Economist Philip Lane.

title: Oil Steadies as Traders Assess Hormuz and Lingering Tensions
title_cn: 交易员评估霍尔木兹海峡和挥之不去的紧张局势，油价稳定
summary: Oil steadied as traffic through the Strait of Hormuz appeared to thin out on Friday just as the US and Iran postponed face-to-face talks over a permanent peace deal, raising uncertainty over a sustained recovery in Persian Gulf exports.

title: Santander Surpasses Inditex as Spain’s Most Valuable Company
title_cn: 桑坦德银行超越 Inditex 成为西班牙最有价值公司
summary: Banco Santander SA has become Spain’s most valuable listed company, overtaking Zara owner Inditex SA for the first time in eight years.

title: Indian Banks Line Up $2.5 Billion Debt Sales Using RBI Swap
title_cn: 印度银行利用印度储备银行互换 (RBI Swap) 出售 25 亿美元债务
summary: At least four lenders including the State Bank of India are preparing to raise about $2.5 billion selling bonds in the coming weeks, tapping a Reserve Bank of India facility that makes it cheaper to borrow dollars, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Stocks Draw Record Weekly Inflows as Investors Pile Into Tech
title_cn: 随着投资者涌入科技股，美国股市每周吸引创纪录的资金流入
summary: US stocks attracted record inflows last week as investors piled into the technology sector, according to Bank of America Corp. strategists.

title: Mukesh Ambani Says Jio Platforms to File IPO Papers Friday
title_cn: 穆克什·安巴尼表示 Jio 平台将于周五提交 IPO 文件
summary: Billionaire Mukesh Ambani said Reliance Industries Ltd.’s digital unit will submit its listing documents by Friday, starting the process of unlocking shareholder value in one of India’s most-anticipated initial public offerings.

title: Collapsed Lender MFS Said to Have Never Registered £300 Million of Mortgages
title_cn: 倒闭的贷款机构 MFS 据称从未登记过 3 亿英镑抵押贷款
summary: A £300 million ($396 million) portfolio of mortgages linked to collapsed lender Market Financial Solutions Ltd. looks to never have been registered with public property records, according to court filings, threatening to complicate lenders’ efforts to establish their claims over the underlying assets.

title: Stocks Slide as Focus Shifts to Iran Deal Hurdles: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着焦点转向伊朗协议障碍，股市下跌：市场结束
summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the hurdles that remain to secure a lasting agreement.

title: Goldman Axes $500 From Gold Target on No Fed Cuts This Year
title_cn: 由于美联储今年没有降息，高盛将黄金目标下调了 500 美元
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. cut its year-end gold forecast by $500 an ounce as the Federal Reserve is no longer seen easing in 2026.

title: MSCI Report Eases Fears of Indonesia Frontier-Market Downgrade
title_cn: MSCI 报告缓解了对印度尼西亚前沿市场降级的担忧
summary: MSCI Inc.’s latest review of Indonesia’s market accessibility signaled to many investors that the risk of a downgrade to frontier-market status remains low, despite the index provider’s concerns over transparency and information flow in the world’s worst-performing stock market.

title: Kenya Parliament Cuts Treasury Tax Measures to $763 Million
title_cn: 肯尼亚议会将财政部税收措施削减至 7.63 亿美元
summary: Kenyan lawmakers watered down a slew of tax proposals fronted by the Treasury that would have raised nearly $1 billion for the East African nation’s budget.

title: Seth Klarman on Counter Narratives
title_cn: 塞思·卡拉曼谈反叙事
summary: Barry sits down with Munger disciple Seth Klarman, CEO of Baupost Group, a Boston-based investment manager with a multi-strategy approach. They discuss Seth's start as a 25 year-old and journey to CEO. They also discuss his approach to risk, IPOs, and sectors along with his sports passions including a smaller ownership in the Boston Red Sox, horse racing, and his feelings about the Boston Celtics' 2026 season. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indian Billionaires Set for Jackpot on National Stock Exchange IPO
title_cn: 印度亿万富翁将在国家证券交易所首次公开募股中赢得大奖
summary: Some of India’s wealthiest investors stand to get even richer from their shareholdings in the nation’s stock exchange, which filed for an initial public offering this week.

title: Candidates Deploy Army of Poll Watchers in Colombia’s High-Stakes Election
title_cn: 候选人在哥伦比亚高风险选举中部署民调观察员大军
summary: Colombia’s presidential campaigns are both flagging the risk of fraud in Sunday’s election, and taking steps to prevent it.

title: US Launches Tariff Probe Into Germany Over Pharma Pricing
title_cn: 美国对德国药品定价发起关税调查
summary: The US launched a tariff investigation into Germany over what it called “persistent underpayment for innovative pharmaceutical products,” setting the stage for possible levies on its goods in retaliation.

title: Ghana Is Weighing Local Control of Gold Fields’ Biggest Mine
title_cn: 加纳正在考虑对金矿最大的矿山实行地方控制
summary: Ghana is considering transferring control of Gold Fields Ltd.’s Tarkwa mine to local firms when its leases expire next April, part of a push to increase control of its gold industry and capture more of the proceeds from high bullion prices. The shares plunged.

title: Iran War Fuels Interest in Renewables, Multilateral Lender Says
title_cn: 多边贷款机构表示，伊朗战争激发了人们对可再生能源的兴趣
summary: The conflict in Iran, which has sent crude prices to multi-year highs, is fueling interest in renewables and projects aimed at boosting energy security, according to the Private Infrastructure Development Group.

title: World Cup 2026’s Dynamic Pricing Has Tickets Going One Way: Up
title_cn: 2026 年世界杯的动态定价使门票单向上涨：上涨
summary: Before the World Cup started, fans raged over the cost of tickets — the highest ever for the tournament. Critics wondered whether prices would crash before kickoff, and if swathes of empty seats would embarrass FIFA’s pricing strategy.

title: UK Bonds Fall as Burnham Win Leaves Markets Speculating on Risks
title_cn: 伯纳姆获胜让市场猜测风险，英国债券下跌
summary: The UK’s government bonds fell after Andy Burnham’s victory in a special election renewed political uncertainty, prompting investors to demand a higher premium to hold the country’s debt.

title: Absa to Lift Kenya Unit Stake to 85% in $239 Million Tender
title_cn: Absa 将通过 2.39 亿美元的投标将肯尼亚单位股权提升至 85%
summary: South Africa’s Absa Group Ltd. plans to raise its stake in its Kenyan unit to 85% through a $238.7 million tender offer, underscoring its confidence in East Africa’s growth prospects.

title: Hormuz Traffic Thins Friday as Shipowners Err on Side of Safety
title_cn: 周五霍尔木兹交通量减少，船东出于安全考虑
summary: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz appeared to thin early on Friday, just a day after a burst of oil flows through the waterway as the US and Iran vowed to lift a dual blockade.

title: It's a Regime-Shift for US Real Yields: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 这是美国实际收益率的制度转变：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Lizzy Burden and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Norwegian Family Offices Back $85 Million Ukraine Defense Tech Fund
title_cn: 挪威家族办公室支持 8500 万美元乌克兰国防技术基金
summary: A group of Norwegian investors have raised $85 million for a venture capital fund focused on Ukrainian defense technology, betting that innovations developed on the battlefield will play a central role in Europe’s security architecture.

title: UK Retail Sales Bounce Back in Surprising Boost for Economy
title_cn: 英国零售销售反弹，经济意外增长
summary: UK retail sales rebounded unexpectedly strongly in May while previous months were revised higher in a sign of consumer resilience that offers hope for the wider economy.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/19/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/19/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Malik: Scars Left by War Include US and GCC Relations
title_cn: 马利克：战争留下的伤痕包括美国和海湾合作委员会的关系
summary: As the interim US-Iran peace deal has taken effect, oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz have begun in earnest. Hasnain Malik, Managing Director for Emerging Market Equity & Geopolitical Strategy at Tellimer spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on the GCC’s plan for the 60 day respite ahead. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BHP Shares Fall After $2.3 Billion Writedown on Potash Mine
title_cn: 钾矿减记 23 亿美元后必和必拓股价下跌
summary: BHP Group shares posted the biggest one-day fall in 14 months on Friday, after the company flagged a $2.3 billion write down on its giant potash mine in Canada due to cost and time overruns for an expansion of the project.

title: Japan’s SMBC Weighs SRTs on Project Finance, LatAm Loans
title_cn: 日本 SMBC 权衡项目融资和拉美贷款的 SRT
summary: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corp. is sounding out investors about at least two significant risk transfers, an increasingly popular transaction that helps lenders free up capital for more profitable growth.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Cloud Services Face Tough EU Antitrust Law
title_cn: 微软、亚马逊云服务面临严厉的欧盟反垄断法
summary: Microsoft Corp.’s Azure and Amazon Web Services are on a collision course with the European Union’s tough digital competition rulebook, after an initial probe into their power over the cloud.

title: Siemens Sees Industrial App Store Sales Doubling in Tech Push
title_cn: 西门子看到工业应用商店销售额在技术推动下翻了一番
summary: Siemens AG expects revenue from its online store to more than double this year, though the maker of industrial software and trains is stopping short of disclosing concrete figures that would track its progress of turning into a tech-led company.

title: UK Digital Bank Starling Shrinks Board as McPike Cements Control
title_cn: 英国数字银行 Starling 缩减董事会规模，McPike 巩固控制地位
summary: Starling Bank Ltd. is streamlining its board in light of a number of departures, a move that increases the sway of UK digital bank’s largest shareholder.

title: Anthropic's Co-Founder and Top Economist on Doing Research at the AI Frontier | Odd Lots
title_cn: Anthropic 联合创始人兼顶级经济学家谈人工智能前沿研究 |零股
summary: There’s a lot to unpack with AI right now — everything from its potential impacts on the labor market and society to more extreme questions about existential risk. Anthropic, which builds frontier models like Mythos, Fable, and Claude, is actively grappling with these issues, including whether governments should limit AI development. Just last week, the Trump administration forced Anthropic to block foreign access to its two leading models. In this episode, we speak with Jack Clark (co-founder and head of public benefit) and Peter McCrory (head of economics) about how Anthropic approaches safety and economic risks. We talk about Anthropic’s preparations for recursive self-improvement, the engineers it's hiring now, and why Jack left Bloomberg to enter the early AI industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Tells ASML It’s Concerned China May Have Top Chip Tool
title_cn: 美国告诉ASML，它担心中国可能拥有顶级芯片工具
summary: Dutch chip-equipment giant ASML Holding NV is contending with its biggest challenge yet under the Trump administration: In a series of recent meetings, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick outlined concerns to ASML’s senior leaders that one of its top-of-the-line machines may have made its way into China, in violation of US-led export restrictions.

title: Fujikura Shares Surge 16% as Outlook Hike Calms Market Jitters
title_cn: 展望上调平息市场不安，藤仓股价飙升 16%
summary: Japanese fiber-optic cablemaker Fujikura Ltd.’s shares gained 16% to their daily limit after the firm unexpectedly raised its profit guidance above market estimates.

title: Prosus Expects Surge in Profits on E-Commerce, Tencent Growth
title_cn: Prosus 预计电子商务和腾讯的增长将带来利润激增
summary: Prosus NV expects core earnings to surge as much as 28% in the year ended March 31st on the back of its growing e-commerce business and an increase in the value of the stake it owns in China’s Tencent.

title: Indian Software Stocks Tumble After Accenture Warns on Growth
title_cn: 埃森哲警告增长后印度软件股暴跌
summary: Shares of Indian software firms tumbled on Friday, joining a global selloff in tech stocks after Accenture Plc forecast slower revenue growth, deepening concerns over a sector that has shed nearly 30% of its market value this year.

title: Traders’ Latest AI-Related Play Is a Struggling Car Parts Stock
title_cn: 交易员最新的人工智能相关策略是陷入困境的汽车零部件股
summary: Investors looking for the stock market’s next artificial intelligence winner have honed in on embattled French car parts maker Valeo SE.

title: Early Users of Anthropic Mythos Still Have Access After US Order
title_cn: 在美国下令后，人择神话的早期用户仍然可以访问
summary: Some firms chosen early on by Anthropic PBC to test the Mythos AI model ahead of a wider release have preserved their access to a preview of the system, despite a US government order that led to the total shutdown of other versions.

title: US Tells ASML China May Have Top Chip Tool
title_cn: 美国告诉ASML中国可能拥有顶级芯片工具
summary: ASML Holding NV, the Dutch chip-equipment giant, is grappling with a major challenge after US  Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick warned its leaders that one of the company’s  advanced lithography machines may have reached China, potentially violating US export restrictions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Says Canada’s Data Law Changes Fail to Ease Concerns
title_cn: 谷歌称加拿大数据法修改未能缓解担忧
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google said Canada’s changes to a proposed law that would help police obtain citizen data from private companies don’t resolve many of its concerns.

title: Fed Rate-Hike Bets Fuel Equities Rally | The Close 6/18/2026
title_cn: 美联储加息押注推动股市上涨收盘价 2026 年 6 月 18 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are GenTrust Head of NY Office, Senior Client Advisor Mimi Duff, Principal Venture Partners Founder & Managing Partner Songyee Yoon, Wedbush SVP of Equity Research Alicia Reese, Goldman Sachs Northeast Region Head Nicole Pullen Ross, Interactive Brokers Chief Strategist Steve Sosnick, JP Morgan Asset Management CEO George Gatch, Chef & Restauranteur Kwame Onwuachi, Former Lululemon CIO Julie Averill, Candle Media Founder & Co-CEO Kevin Mayer. & SevenRooms Co-Founder & CEO Joel Montaniel. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Criticizes EU Proposal for Satellite Spectrum Tender
title_cn: SpaceX 批评欧盟卫星频谱招标提案
summary: SpaceX criticized the European Union’s plans for the distribution of satellite spectrum, a key element in the growth plans for the Elon Musk-led company’s Starlink service following its record-setting initial public offering.

title: SevenRooms CEO on New Reservation Organizing Platform
title_cn: SevenRooms 首席执行官谈新的预订组织平台
summary: Joel Montaniel, Co-Founder and CEO of SevenRooms, discussed the company's new platform, Channel Connect, which aims to simplify reservation management for restaurants by consolidating bookings from multiple channels into a single system. Unlike the hotel industry, where centralized booking systems are common, restaurants currently manage reservations across various apps and platforms, often using multiple devices, creating operational challenges. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Candle’s Mayer Says Ad-Backed Streaming ‘Snuck Up’ on Industry
title_cn: Candle 的梅耶尔表示，广告支持的流媒体“偷偷”进入了行业
summary: Fox Corp.’s $22 billion acquisition of Roku Inc. illustrates how free-to-watch, ad-supported streaming services are becoming a major force in the entertainment industry, according to Candle Media Inc. co-Chief Executive Officer Kevin Mayer.

title: Companies Move to Secure Data as AI Increases Security Risks
title_cn: 随着人工智能增加安全风险，公司转向保护数据
summary:
Michael Cardaci, CEO of FedHIVE said that the government is moving 'faster than its ever moved before' to secure data and make sure that US computing companies are compliant in case of national security risks as AI use ramps up. 
Cardaci said that the US government is focused on keeping US technology inside of its borders as the race for global AI dominance heats up.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fmr. Disney Exec: Media Consolidating Around New Model
title_cn: 先生。迪士尼高管：围绕新模式进行媒体整合
summary:
Kevin Mayer, former Walt Disney Direct-to-Consumer & International Chair, discusses Fox's recent $22 billion acquisition of Roku, highlighting a significant strategic move from traditional media towards streaming. Fox, which previously lacked a major streaming platform, aims to strengthen its position by integrating Roku's streaming service alongside its existing ad-supported streamer, Tubi. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Acts to Speed Up Power Grid Hook-Ups for AI Data Centers
title_cn: 美国采取措施加快人工智能数据中心的电网连接
summary: US regulators have taken their biggest step yet to speed the connection of data centers to the country’s grids while simultaneously attempting to slow surging utility bills that have angered Americans.

title: SpaceX Shares End First Week of Trading Up 37% From IPO Price
title_cn: SpaceX 股价首周较 IPO 价格上涨 37%
summary: SpaceX stock ended higher in its first week of trading, even though its rough ride showed the largest-ever IPO was not immune to the type of share-price volatility that tends to rock big companies after they go public.

title: Fmr. Lululemon CIO on AI’s Impact on C-Suites, Jobs
title_cn: 先生。 Lululemon 首席信息官谈人工智能对高管层和工作的影响
summary: Julie Averill, former CIO of Lululemon, REI, and Nordstrom, discusses this shift in the context of her new book, "Chief Impact Officer," which offers a fresh perspective on leadership amid the ongoing technological revolution. Averill brings her extensive experience scaling Lululemon's revenue to over $10 billion to the conversation, emphasizing the critical role of AI adoption in maintaining job security and driving organizational impact. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Rallies to Record After Trump Touts Apple Chip Deal
title_cn: 特朗普吹捧苹果芯片交易后，英特尔股价创历史新高
summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.

title: President Trump Announces Apple and Intel Chip Collaboration | Bloomberg Tech 6/18/2026
title_cn: 特朗普总统宣布苹果与英特尔芯片合作 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 18 日
summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow discusses the latest announcement made by President Donald Trump, which will see Apple and Intel joining forces to produce chips domestically, sending shares of the chipmaker higher. Plus, Anduril's CEO discusses how the company won a contract with the US Air Force to produce autonomous fighters. And, SpaceX wraps up its first full week of trading, with shares falling for a second day straight. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPM Asset Mgt. CEO: AI Can Power Markets for Some Time
title_cn: 摩根大通资产管理CEO：人工智能可以在一段时间内为市场提供动力
summary: George Gatch, CEO of JPMorgan Asset Management, discussed the current excitement surrounding mega-cap initial public offerings (IPOs) in the technology sector. He emphasized the strong innovation and investment opportunities these IPOs present, describing the trend as a 'rising tide that is lifting all boats.' He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rise With Nvidia Leading as Semiconductor Companies Surge
title_cn: 半导体公司激增，英伟达领涨，股价上涨
summary: US stocks rose on Thursday as chips shares extended Wednesday’s rally. Nvidia Corp. topped S&P 500 Index gainers on a points basis, while the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index, known as the SOX, advanced 6.4% to a record high.

title: Meta Strikes New AI Computing Deals With Data Center Firm Crusoe
title_cn: Meta 与数据中心公司 Crusoe 达成新的人工智能计算协议
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has secured new agreements to get AI computing power from data center developer Crusoe, bolstering the infrastructure it needs to support an ambitious artificial intelligence expansion.

title: Goldman’s Pullen Ross: PE ‘Actively Engaged’ in Sports
title_cn: 高盛的普伦·罗斯：体育界“积极参与”体育运动
summary: Nicole Pullen Ross, Northeast Region Head & Head of Sports and Entertainment Solutions at Goldman Sachs, discusses the evolving landscape of US sports and the athletes driving their growing popularity. She highlighted her role in creating a division at Goldman Sachs dedicated to helping professional athletes manage their wealth by applying strategies typically used by C-suite executives. she speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Even Madonna Has to Fight for Every Scrap of Internet Attention
title_cn: 甚至麦当娜也必须为互联网上的每一点关注而奋斗
summary: Even if you’re one of the biggest pop stars in history, Grindr and Bilt can help you sell albums

title: Rumble Bets on AI Compute Demand With New AI Platform
title_cn: Rumble 通过新的人工智能平台押注人工智能计算需求
summary: Video platform Rumble is jumping on the AI bandwagon with its newest AI platform. Launching as Quake AI, the new sector combines cloud, compute, and AI infrastructure, and is slated to dominate the company's business segment. Rumble CEO Chris Pavlovski joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" with more on the pivot. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Anticipate Fresh Liquidity Following Historic SpaceX Debut
title_cn: 投资者预计 SpaceX 历史性首次亮相后将出现新的流动性
summary: SpaceX's historic public debut comes during a critical inflection point as a wave of multibillion-dollar AI companies prepare to go public. With the unprecedented IPO, investors are anticipating a wide-scale "distribution event" that will give private markets the fresh cash it desperately needs. Matt Witheiler, Head of Late-Stage Growth at Wellington Management, thinks the private tech ecosystem will see a cash return. He joins Ed Ludlow of "Bloomberg Tech". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Braces for Another Round of Political Churn
title_cn: 英国准备迎接新一轮政治动荡
summary: Burnham’s by-election win paves the way for him to challenge for the premier post.

title: Starmer Vows to Fight On as Burnham Prepares Challenge
title_cn: 斯塔默誓言在伯纳姆准备挑战时继续战斗
summary: Andy Burnham Photographer: Christopher Furlong/Getty Images

title: EU’s East Wants Brussels to Speed Up Drone-Defense Funding
title_cn: 欧盟东欧国家希望布鲁塞尔加快无人机防御资金投入
summary: European Union nations on the bloc’s eastern flank are piling pressure on Brussels to speed up the approval of air-defense funding as more military drones stray into their airspace from Russia and Ukraine, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Burnham Paves Way to Oust Starmer With UK Parliament Return
title_cn: 英国议会回归，伯纳姆为罢免斯塔默铺平道路
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham won a decisive victory for the ruling Labour Party that delivers him a seat in Parliament and, with it, a pathway to challenge UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer for his job.

title: EU’s Costa Justifies Kremlin Calls as Leaders Query Strategy
title_cn: 欧盟科斯塔证明克里姆林宫的呼吁是领导人质疑策略的合理性
summary: European Council President Antonio Costa defended his recent outreach to Russia during a European Union summit, as he fielded criticism from some leaders that the move was misguided.

title: Market Attuned to UK Political Changes, Wytenus Says
title_cn: 威特努斯表示，市场已适应英国政治变化
summary: Erik Wytenus, JPMorgan Private Bank EMEA head of investment strategy, discusses markets' reaction to Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham's victory in the Makerfield special election. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, Wytenus says the market is attuned and prepared for the "era of fragmentation and political winds of change," adding that "focusing on what the private sector is doing on its own merits is typically the best way to invest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vance Warns Israel Against Attacking Trump’s Iran Deal
title_cn: 万斯警告以色列不要攻击特朗普的伊朗协议
summary: US Vice President JD Vance hit back at Israeli cabinet members who have criticized Donald Trump’s interim peace deal with Iran.

title: Scottish Nationalists Beaten in By-Election After Money Scandal
title_cn: 金钱丑闻后苏格兰民族主义者在补选中惨败
summary: The Scottish National Party was dealt a blow following an embezzlement scandal involving its former chief executive as the Conservatives scored a decisive victory in a by-election.

title: US and Iran Delay Nuclear Talks as Lebanon Clashes Worsen
title_cn: 黎巴嫩冲突加剧，美国和伊朗推迟核谈判
summary: The US and Iran have postponed the start of their negotiations over a permanent peace deal and restricting the Islamic Republic’s nuclear program.

title: Burnham Election Victory Opens Path to Challenge UK PM Starmer
title_cn: 伯纳姆选举胜利为挑战英国首相斯塔默开辟了道路
summary:
Andy Burnham won a decisive victory in the Makerfield by-election, securing a pathway to challenge UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer for his job.

Joe Mayes was at the count, and explains what could happen next. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia’s Lavrov Rejects European Push on Ukraine as ‘Ultimatum’
title_cn: 俄罗斯拉夫罗夫拒绝欧洲对乌克兰的推动作为“最后通牒”
summary: Russia’s foreign minister said Europe’s latest proposal for peace talks between Moscow and Kyiv amounts to an ultimatum, arguing that demands set out by the bloc earlier this month cannot serve as a basis for negotiations with Moscow.

title: Andy Burnham Wins Election In Threat to UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer | Daybreak Europe 6/19/2026
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 赢得大选，威胁英国首相基尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer)黎明欧洲 6/19/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Today's guests: 
Alastair Pinder, Head of EM & Global Equity Strategist, HSBC; Simon French, Chief Economist, Panmure Gordon (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham's By-Election Win Paves Way to Oust Starmer
title_cn: 伯纳姆的补选胜利为罢免斯塔默铺平了道路
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham won a decisive victory for the Labour Party in a by-election in the constituency of Makerfield with 54.8% of the vote, defeating Robert Kenyon from right-wing Reform UK, who secured 34.5%. Burnham's win forges a pathway to challenge UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer for his job. Bloomberg's Ruth David reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Record Debt Costs Show Fiscal Pressures Facing Starmer Rivals
title_cn: 创纪录的债务成本显示斯塔默竞争对手面临财政压力
summary: Debt-interest costs saw UK government borrowing rise to the highest level for any May in six years, underscoring the fiscal challenges awaiting any successor to Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

title: Vance Delays Swiss Trip for Iran Talks
title_cn: 万斯因伊朗会谈而推迟瑞士之行
summary: The US and Iran have postponed the start of their negotiations over a permanent peace deal and restricting the Islamic Republic’s nuclear program. It’s unclear why the talks, meant to be held in Switzerland on Friday, have been delayed. On Thursday, US Vice President JD Vance told reporters at a briefing he believed the technical talks would begin at some point this weekend and that he would travel to Switzerland. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Tells ASML It’s Concerned China May Have Top Chip Tool
title_cn: 美国告诉ASML，它担心中国可能拥有顶级芯片工具
summary: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick outlined concerns to ASML's senior leaders that one of its top-of-the-line machines may have made its way into China, in violation of US-led export restrictions. ASML has pushed back on Lutnick's suggestion, explaining that none of its extreme ultraviolet lithography machines are in China, according to people familiar with the talks. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: One Nation's Pauline Hanson Calls for `Monocultural' Australia
title_cn: 一国党的宝琳·汉森呼吁澳大利亚实行“单一文化”
summary: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson says in a June 17, 2026, speech at the National Press Club of Australia that immigration and multiculturalism has pushed the country into crisis, and that it's time all Australians "live under the one cultural umbrella.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Issues Visa Restrictions for Some Tigray Leaders in Ethiopia
title_cn: 美国对埃塞俄比亚部分提格雷领导人实施签证限制
summary: The US has imposed visa restrictions on several members of the Tigray People’s Liberation Front in Ethiopia who it said were threatening peace and stability in the Horn of Africa nation.

title: South Africa’s $218 Billion Fund Again Rocked by Governance Woes
title_cn: 南非 2180 亿美元的基金再次受到治理困境的冲击
summary: Africa’s biggest fund manager is again tangled up in a governance and management crisis, while its unlisted investments continue to underperform.

title: Signal Boss: AI Chatbots Aren’t Your Friends
title_cn: Signal Boss：人工智能聊天机器人不是你的朋友
summary: Meredith Whittaker, president of the encrypted messaging app Signal, says autonomous AI agents, device scanning and digital advertising are converging into a new architecture of surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: California Billionaire Tax Backers Float Lower Rate in Push for Deal
title_cn: 加州亿万富翁纳税支持者降低利率以推动交易
summary: The group behind a proposed 5% wealth tax in California is pushing for a compromise with Governor Gavin Newsom by pitching a 2% levy instead.

title: Australian Beef Exports Face 55% China Tariff as Quota Reached
title_cn: 配额达到后澳大利亚牛肉出口面临55%的中国关税
summary: Australian beef exports to China will face an additional 55% tariff starting this weekend after hitting Beijing’s annual quota limit, which could impact trade flows and prompt producers to seek new markets for red meat.

title: EU Leaders Warn on China Imbalances But Respond Cautiously
title_cn: 欧盟领导人对中国失衡发出警告但反应谨慎
summary: European Union leaders sought to strike a balance between addressing deepening trade imbalances with China while not provoking a damaging conflict with the world’s No. 2 economy.

title: US Ends Hormuz Blockade, Downplays Tolls as Negotiations Restart
title_cn: 美国结束霍尔木兹封锁，淡化死亡人数，重启谈判
summary: The US-Iran interim peace deal took effect and shipping started returning to the Strait of Hormuz as the US declared an end to its blockade and a complex negotiating period over Tehran’s nuclear program began in earnest.

title: Vance Warns Israel Against Attacking its 'Only Powerful Ally' | Balance of Power 06/18/2026
title_cn: 万斯警告以色列不要攻击其“唯一强大的盟友”权力平衡 06/18/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Former National Security Advisor John Bolton warns that Iran will use oil funds to rebuild their war capabilities and calls the current situation a "trap of Trump's own making." Aaron David Miller, Senior Fellow at the Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, comments on Vice President JD Vance’s warning to Israel against attacking its “only powerful ally.” Marc Morial, President & CEO of the National Urban League, discusses the grand opening of the Obama Presidential Center and what the center represents.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Obama Presidential Center Tells An Incredible Story: Morial
title_cn: 奥巴马总统中心讲述了一个令人难以置信的故事：莫里尔
summary: Marc Morial, President & CEO of the National Urban League, discusses the grand opening of the Obama Presidential Center and what the center represents. He also talks about how recent redistricting efforts, especially in the South, are impacting the Black electorate. Marc speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CFTC Not Ready for Prediction Market Social Cost, State AGs Say
title_cn: 国家 AG 称 CFTC 尚未准备好预测市场社会成本
summary: Attorneys general for California and Minnesota said the Commodity Futures Trading Commission isn’t equipped to handle gambling-associated issues like addiction, highlighting challenges the federal regulator faces as it aims to assert authority over prediction markets.

title: Bonta Calls DOJ’s Statement Clearing Paramount Deal ‘Shameless’
title_cn: 邦塔称司法部澄清派拉蒙交易的声明“无耻”
summary: California Attorney General Rob Bonta criticized the Trump administration for clearing Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., as several states mull a possible challenge to the deal.
